name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread with Orange Cream Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup butter or margarine, softened (2/3 stick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using an electric mixer, beat butter and sugar until light.
2. Add pumpkin and egg, mixing well.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, baking powder, ginger, and allspice. Gradually add to the butter mixture, mixing until well blended.
4. Stir in currants and pecans.
5. Pour batter into a greased 8 x 4-inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 to 1 1/4 hours or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Serve with Orange Cream Cheese.
Orange cream cheese:
In a medium bowl, combine 1 package cream cheese, softened, 3 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons Pure Vanilla Extract, and 1 teaspoon freshly grated orange peel. Stir until smooth. Stir in 1 to 2 teaspoons milk to make spreading consistency.
